description: Seeking information that confirms existing beliefs while ignoring contradicting evidence
mitigation: Actively seek disconfirming evidence and consider opposite viewpoints

description: Relying too heavily on the first piece of information encountered
mitigation: Use multiple independent starting points and update systematically

description: Overestimating importance of information that comes to mind easily
mitigation: Seek statistical base rates and consider retrieval factors

description: Excessive confidence in own answers relative to actual accuracy
Continuing investment based on prior investments rather than future value
mitigation: Focus on marginal costs and benefits only

description: Low ability people overestimate their competence
mitigation: Seek expert feedback and structured self-assessment

description: Preferring current state over change despite potential improvement
mitigation: Compare all options including change scenarios equally

description: Letting overall impression influence evaluation of specific traits
Attributing others behaviors to disposition over situation
Groups seeking information that confirms shared beliefs
mitigation: Designate devil advocate and require minority reports

description: Believing past random events influence future outcomes
mitigation: Understand independence of events and use base rates

description: Doing things because many other people do them
mitigation: Decide based on evidence before checking others opinions

description: Overestimating likelihood of positive events and underestimating negatives
mitigation: Use premortem and consider worst case scenarios

description: Seeing past events as having been predictable after they occurred
mitigation: Record predictions before outcomes are known

description: Focusing on successes that passed selection process
mitigation: Always examine failed cases and base rate of failure
